overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rainy, neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The character navigates under elevated highways, past graffiti-covered walls, across wet intersections, and along waterfront promenades while surrounded by pedestrians with glowing umbrellas and futuristic architecture.

events.description: moving from under overpass into open street crossing area
crossing wet asphalt intersection with neon reflections
turning right onto sidewalk next to neon building

agents.ego_description: walking through rainy cyberpunk intersection under elevated highway, crossing street alongside pedestrians with glowing umbrellas

pedestrian with purple glowing umbrella crossing intersection

bright red neon signs reading NO ENTRY on dark building facade
large red digital billboard displaying ZOING BLAST advertisement
rain-slicked asphalt with puddles reflecting red and blue neon lights
suspended traffic light fixture showing red signal

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive elevated highway overpass in a rainy cyberpunk city. The character crosses a wet asphalt intersection illuminated by red neon NO ENTRY signs and a large digital billboard. Pedestrians with glowing orange and purple umbrellas share the crosswalk as the camera turns onto a sidewalk beside a neon-lit building facade.

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at tall skyscrapers and neon signage
approaching covered walkway entrance under highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk next to neon-lit buildings, looking up at towering architecture and signage

entered.detail: teal-colored building exterior with pink and red neon strip lighting
black metal safety railing along sidewalk edge
blue neon sign reading AI PAL on building upper level
tall vertical pink neon sign on building corner
tall building with communication antennas and aircraft warning lights

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet concrete sidewalk beside a teal cyberpunk building facade illuminated by pink neon strips. The camera looks up to reveal towering skyscrapers with communication antennas against the night sky. Blue neon signs including one reading AI PAL adorn the buildings as the character approaches a covered walkway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway with graffiti walls

approaching street crossing at end of covered walkway

illuminated sign with white cross symbol indicating medical facility entrance
underside of elevated highway with exposed structural beams and pipes

green garbage bags and debris left on sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered pedestrian shelter beneath an elevated highway, protected from the rain. The left wall features vibrant red and blue graffiti tags, while a medical clinic sign with a white cross hangs ahead. Yellow painted patches mark the concrete sidewalk where trash bags sit near the railing. The space is dimly lit with a mix of ambient city glow and artificial lighting.

events.description: waiting at crosswalk for traffic light to change
stopping at red light on waterfront walkway

agents.ego_description: crossing street at marked crosswalk and walking along waterfront barrier with other pedestrians in the rain

notable_agents.action: female pedestrian with red glowing accents on jacket walking ahead on crosswalk
male pedestrian with blue and red backpack walking alongside

entered.detail: yellow and blue striped crosswalk with red WAIT text painted on surface
metal safety barrier separating sidewalk from water below
large bridge with red navigation lights visible through fog
steam rising from industrial vents near waterfront edge
traffic signal showing red for pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the character crosses a wide street at a marked crosswalk with yellow and blue stripes. The scene opens to a waterfront promenade with a metal railing separating the path from the water below. Steam rises from vents on the right while a fog-shrouded bridge with red lights spans the distance. The character waits at a red traffic light alongside other pedestrians including a woman with red glowing jacket accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy sidewalk with mega-skyscrapers and neon advertising

events.description: camera tilts up to look at towering mega-skyscraper with vertical lights
passing through denser crowd of pedestrians on busy sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along busy sidewalk with other pedestrians, looking up at towering mega-skyscraper with vertical orange lights

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing purple umbrella walking past on the right

entered.detail: massive towering building with vertical orange light strips rising into fog
elevated walkway connecting buildings with enclosed passage
multiple colorful digital advertisements and brand logos on building faces
tall street lamps with multiple fixture arms illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along a busy sidewalk with moderate crowds. A massive mega-skyscraper with vertical orange light strips dominates the center background, rising into the foggy night sky. Neon billboards and advertisements cover the building facades on the left while street light poles line the path. The camera looks up to take in the scale of the towering architecture as pedestrians with glowing umbrellas pass by.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked urban intersection beneath a massive overpass into a narrow corridor of towering neon skyscrapers. It begins under the heavy concrete of an elevated highway, crossing wet asphalt illuminated by red neon signs and a large digital billboard while weaving through pedestrians with glowing orange and purple umbrellas. As the camera turns onto a sidewalk, the scene shifts toward a teal building facade accented by vibrant pink neon strips. The perspective then tilts upward to reveal a dense skyline of communication antennas and blue neon signs, including one for AI PAL, before finally approaching the entrance of a covered walkway.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban underpass into a sprawling, neon-lit waterfront district. It begins within a covered pedestrian shelter beneath an elevated highway, passing vibrant graffiti and a medical clinic sign amidst dimly lit concrete and scattered trash. As the character emerges from the walkway, the scene opens onto a wide, rain-slicked intersection where the camera follows them across a striped crosswalk toward a fog-shrouded bridge and a waterfront promenade. The environment then shifts into a dense pedestrian corridor, moving past steam vents and crowds of people with glowing umbrellas. Finally, the camera tilts upward to reveal the overwhelming scale of the city, dominated by a massive mega-skyscraper with vertical orange light strips that pierces the foggy night sky.
